{{CargoRelic
|name=Annals of Joseon
|class_id=20912
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=03-06
|source=
|description=On Mar 6, 1934 AD, Records of Joseon were eventually finished.<br>Records of Joseon are a series of great historic works covering the 27 kings' reign during 500 years. The Records' compilation started during the reign of King Taejo and had never been interrupted, making them a massive chronicle in the world.
|fame=45
|art=27
|fth=32
|civ=19
|tech=31
|ss1=Upon traveling through a new area:<br>> Gain +2 INTEL
|ss2=Upon traveling through a new area:<br>> Gain +4 INTEL
|ss3=Upon traveling through a new area:<br>> Gain +6 INTEL
|ss4=Upon traveling through a new area:<br>> Gain +10 INTEL
|ss7=Upon traveling through a new area:<br>> Gain +10 INTEL<br>Upon traveling through a new area:<br>> Gain +10 INTEL (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Koryeo skill I.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: In Koryeo, Snail ATK +20
}}
